title: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Campaign Monitor is stronger for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point ($11/mo vs $13/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Campaign Monitor to Mailchimp is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
